_publications._publicationTitle: Natural history of meningioma development in mice reveals: a synergy of Nf2 and p16(Ink4a) mutations.

_contextSnippet: osteomas at the adCre injection site, presumably induced by biallelic Nf2 inactivation in a neural crest precursor
details: Induced osteomas at injection site and liver tumors, presumably through biallelic Nf2 inactivation in neural crest precursors
